name: Navigation Menu
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Navigation Menu wrapper composed from the local Base UI Navigation Menu primitive, local class canonicalization, local SVG chevron/status icons, origin slot classes, deterministic popup/viewport attributes, and static demo/RTL examples.

registry.reason: shadcn Navigation Menu composes the local Base UI Navigation Menu primitive.
shadcn Navigation Menu uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema options used by the local wrapper.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Navigation Menu implementation.
Origin CVA trigger styling is represented by a pure local class helper.
Origin chevron and status icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in this batch.
Origin Next Link usage is represented by Foldkit anchor attributes in installable examples.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: NavigationMenuDemo
examples.description: Default Navigation Menu with getting started, components, icon, and docs link items.

examples.title: NavigationMenuRtl
examples.description: RTL Navigation Menu with deterministic local translated labels and end alignment.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Navigation Menu attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Chevron/status icons use local inline SVG helpers and examples use Foldkit anchors instead of lucide-react and next/link.
deviations.rationale: The local helpers preserve icon, aria-hidden, link, and slot contracts without adding React app dependencies.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local deterministic direction and labels instead of the origin app language selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector.

deviations.summary: Positioner, popup, viewport, content, and activation-direction surfaces expose deterministic attributes without runtime DOM measurement or auto-size mutation.
deviations.rationale: Measured navigation-menu viewport sizing belongs behind a shared runtime service, not inside the shadcn wrapper.
